title: SQL Server Live Slowness Triage
description: Identify blocking, waits, and SQL causing current SQL Server performance issues
author: A. Pogaku

active_requests.description: Active requests, wait types, and blocking chains

interactive_hints.blocking_chains: Run when LCK_ waits are visible — maps the full blocking chain to identify the head blocker
interactive_hints.top_wait_stats: Run to see cumulative wait statistics since last restart — helps distinguish transient from persistent issues
interactive_hints.query_store_top_consumers: Run to identify the specific queries driving the current load
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

blocking_chains.description: Blocking session chains and lock wait details

interactive_hints.top_wait_stats: Run to see overall wait statistics context alongside the blocking analysis
interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far

top_wait_stats.description: Top wait statistics since last SQL Server restart

interactive_hints.stop: Stop here and generate the final analysis with results gathered so far
